draft:
Dear Officer:

I am writing this letter in support of the extraordinary ability visa petition filed by Ms. Zara Ivanova. Ms. Ivanova is an extraordinary leader in the consumer goods industry, particularly in digital marketing and business transformation. I am Alex Navarro, CEO and owner of Brightplay, a company specializing in innovative children’s products. With over 20 years of experience leading organizations across multiple industries, including steering companies from financial distress to billion-dollar valuations, I have had the privilege of working with many talented professionals. Ms. Ivanova stands out as a uniquely skilled and impactful individual whose contributions have been truly transformative.

As the CEO and owner of Brightplay, I have had the privilege of leading a company that specializes in innovative children’s products. Brightplay is a global leader in developing and manufacturing educational toys for children. Since its establishment in 1983, the company has been dedicated to producing safe, quality, and innovative toys that promote developmental learning through play. Our products are designed to nurture creativity, imagination, and cognitive development in young minds, making learning a fun and engaging experience. With a strong commitment to excellence, Brightplay has become a trusted name among parents, educators, and retailers worldwide. Our extensive range of toys includes sensory balls, building blocks, musical instruments, and more, all crafted with the highest standards of safety and quality. We take pride in our ability to inspire and support the growth of children through play, and we continue to innovate and expand our offerings to meet the evolving needs of families and educators.

My professional background spans over two decades, during which I have held leadership roles in various industries, including investment and manufacturing. Prior to my current role at Brightplay, I founded and served as the CEO of J20 Group, an investment company in Israel focusing on distressed mid-cap companies needing turnarounds. This experience honed my skills in corporate restructuring and value enhancement. I also served as the CEO of Novochem Fine Chemicals, where I led the company through a critical period of financial distress, turning it around to profitability and preparing it for a successful sale. My earlier career included significant roles in the financial sector, such as Vice President at Zohar Mezzanine and Private Equity Fund, where I managed substantial transactions and served on the Board of Directors for portfolio companies. I also gained valuable experience in mergers and acquisitions as a Partner and Head of the M&A Department at Polaris Capital. My educational background includes a BA in Accounting from Haifa University, and I am a Certified Public Accountant, which has provided me with a strong foundation in financial practices and principles.

Throughout my career, I have had the opportunity to work with many talented professionals across various industries. However, Ms. Ivanova stands out as an extraordinary individual whose contributions have been truly transformative. Her expertise in digital marketing and business transformation has been instrumental in driving Brightplay’s growth and success.

I have worked closely with Ms. Ivanova for over two years since she joined Brightplay as Chief Marketing Officer and General Manager of Online Sales. From the very beginning, Ms. Ivanova demonstrated her exceptional ability to balance strategic thinking with tactical execution. Her leadership and vision have been integral to our company’s success and growth.

Ms. Ivanova is a remarkably intelligent and accomplished leader with a strong academic foundation. She earned her bachelor’s degree in Economics from Stanford University and her MBA from the Cambridge School of Business, two of the most prestigious academic institutions in the world. Her education has been critical in shaping her strategic and analytical abilities. At Brightplay, she has consistently applied these skills to develop innovative solutions, identify growth opportunities, and lead our organization to new heights.

Ms. Ivanova’s contributions have revolutionized Brightplay’s digital marketing strategy. When she joined, our online sales were negligible. Through her expertise in digital marketing, media tools, and product optimization, she grew our online sales from $0 to multimillion-dollar revenues. Her leadership in developing our presence on platforms like E-market and RetailWorks has turned our online channel into a major driver of business growth.

In addition to transforming our core business, Ms. Ivanova incubated a new consumer brand that addresses unmet needs in the sensory toy market. She led strategic workshops, identified market opportunities, and guided a cross-functional team to create a new product lineup and brand strategy. This initiative has garnered attention from venture capital investors, and we are actively exploring the possibility of spinning it off into a standalone business. Ms. Ivanova’s vision and leadership have made this opportunity possible.

In 2023, Ms. Ivanova spearheaded the launch of a product that won the prestigious Family Fun Toy of the Year Award. This achievement resulted directly from her leadership in product development, consumer testing, and media strategy. She identified opportunities for innovation within Brightplay’s bestselling line of sensory toys, leading the development of new colorways and creating a cohesive product collection. Ms. Ivanova also crafted the media pitch that garnered critical industry and consumer attention, ultimately earning the recognition that set Brightplay apart in the competitive toy market.

The Toy of the Year Award is highly selective and highlights excellence in toys that meet rigorous criteria, including safety, ease of assembly, construction quality, sustainability of packaging, and developmental benefits such as fostering fine motor skills, encouraging social interaction, and supporting imaginative play. Products are evaluated by experts at the Family Fun Institute Parenting Lab, who conduct comprehensive in-lab and at-home testing. Additionally, more than 200 children across the U.S. assess the “fun factor,” ensuring the toy’s appeal to its primary audience. This recognition demonstrates the industry-wide acknowledgment of Ms. Ivanova’s ability to deliver exceptional, quality products and marketing plans.

Ms. Ivanova’s expertise and contributions have had a measurable impact on Brightplay. She has driven millions of dollars in revenue, secured prestigious industry awards, and positioned the company for long-term growth and innovation. Her leadership, creativity, and strategic vision have been invaluable to our success.

Ms. Zara Ivanova is a professional of extraordinary ability whose work has left a lasting impact on Brightplay and the broader consumer goods industry. I am honored to recommend her for this extraordinary ability visa petition and am confident that she will continue to achieve exceptional success in her field. Please do not hesitate to contact me if you require additional details or supporting documentation.

Sincerely,

Alex Navarro

CEO and Owner

Brightplay
final:
To Whom This May Concern:

	I am honored to provide this recommendation in support of Ms. Zara Ivanova. I have worked closely with Ms. Ivanova for several years at Brightplay and can confidently attest that she is truly extraordinary.

	As far as my background, I am a business leader with over two decades of experience in investment, manufacturing, and corporate turnaround specialization. Currently, I serve as Partner & CEO of Brightplay, while also leading J20 Group, an investment company I founded in 2020. My expertise in corporate transformations was particularly demonstrated during my tenure as CEO of Novochem Fine Chemicals, where I successfully led the company from Stay of Proceedings to profitability. Prior to this, I spent 11 years as Vice President at Zohar Mezzanine and Private Equity Fund, managing transactions exceeding $600M and serving on multiple corporate boards. My career began at RMQ, followed by a role as Partner and Head of M&A at Polaris Capital.

	I am proud to be leading Brightplay, a global toy development and manufacturing company that I've been steering as Partner & CEO since 2021. Founded in 1983, our company has grown from its Israeli headquarters to establish strong international presence with branches in North America and Hong Kong. At Brightplay, our mission is deeply rooted in producing safe, high-quality, and innovative children's toys that foster developmental learning through play. Since taking the helm, I've been committed to upholding and expanding upon our nearly 40-year legacy of creating educational toys that make a real difference in children's development. Our global footprint, with operations across multiple continents, allows us to serve diverse markets while maintaining our unwavering commitment to quality and innovation in children's educational toys.

 Throughout my career, I have had the opportunity to work with many talented professionals across various industries. However, Ms. Ivanova stands out as an extraordinary individual whose contributions have been truly transformative. Her expertise in digital marketing and business transformation has been instrumental in driving Brightplay’s growth and success.I have worked closely with Ms. Ivanova for over two years since she joined Brightplay as Chief Marketing Officer and General Manager of Online Sales. From the very beginning, Ms. Ivanova demonstrated her remarkable ability to balance strategic thinking with tactical execution. Her leadership and vision have been integral to our company’s success and growth.

 Ms. Ivanova is a remarkably intelligent and accomplished leader with a strong academic foundation. She earned her Bachelor’s degree in Economics from Stanford University and her MBA from the Cambridge School of Business, two of the most prestigious academic institutions in the world. Her education has been critical in shaping her strategic and analytical abilities. At Brightplay, she has consistently applied these skills to develop innovative solutions, identify growth opportunities, and lead our organization to new heights.

	Since joining Brightplay as Chief Marketing Officer and General Manager of Online Sales in June 2022, Ms. Ivanova has been pivotal in transforming our digital presence and revenue streams through her leadership of our e-commerce initiatives. When she first took charge of our digital marketing strategy, our online sales were virtually nonexistent. Through her strategic vision and execution, she built our digital business into a multimillion-dollar revenue channel, particularly by strengthening our presence on major platforms like E-market and RetailWorks. Her ability to identify and capitalize on online market opportunities has made our e-commerce division a primary driver of business growth. Since her recent promotion to North America Sales Lead, she has been crucial in overseeing all sales channels in the US - currently accounting for 80% of the company’s revenue. She manages the profitability for more than half of the business, emphasizing her critical role in achieving sustainable growth.

	Her product development acumen has been equally impressive, notably in creating an innovative consumer brand in the sensory toy market. She spearheaded strategic workshops and led a dedicated team through the entire process of developing a compelling product lineup and brand strategy. This brand's potential has been validated by significant interest from venture capital investors, who are considering it as a standalone business opportunity. This achievement underscores her ability to identify market opportunities and execute strategies that create substantial business value. Brightplay’s products have been highlighted in notable publications like the NY Times, Lifestyle Journal, Family Fun, and Business Digest, showcasing the extensive reach and influence of her strategic marketing efforts.

	Perhaps most notably, Ms. Ivanova's leadership culminated in our company winning the prestigious Family Fun Toy of the Year Award in 2023. This recognition, involving rigorous evaluation of safety standards, construction quality, and developmental benefits by industry experts and extensive testing by hundreds of children across the United States, validates her comprehensive approach to product development and marketing. She revitalized our bestselling sensory toy line with innovative colorways and created a cohesive product collection that resonated with both industry experts and consumers. Her skilled media strategy and pitch work brought significant attention to these innovations, further cementing Brightplay's position as a leader in the educational toy market, particularly within early and special educational centers, including pediatric therapy practices.

 Ms. Ivanova’s expertise and contributions have had a measurable impact on Brightplay. She has driven millions of dollars in revenue, secured prestigious industry awards, and positioned the company for long-term growth and innovation. Her leadership, creativity, and strategic vision have been invaluable to our success.

	In summary, Ms. Ivanova’s remarkable contributions to Brightplay have not only strengthened our market position but have also propelled the company toward a future poised with growth and innovation. Her strategic foresight in digital marketing and her ability to develop groundbreaking product lines have significantly enhanced our financial performance and industry reputation. As a leader, she combines rigorous academic training with a profound understanding of market dynamics, making her an asset to our company and the broader industry. I am confident in her continued success and transformative impact, and wholeheartedly support her in all future endeavors. Should you require any further information, please feel free to contact me.

Respectfully,



Alex Navarro
Partner & CEO
Brightplay
[insert contact information]
